hook: Humor is strongest when it comes from self-possession rather than from trying to earn safety.
body: People can feel the difference between playful expression and nervous entertainment work.

hook: Many men use humor to manage tension so aggressively that the humor itself starts feeling tense.
body: Use humor to add oxygen to the interaction, not to rescue every quiet second from existence.

hook: Use humor to add oxygen to the interaction, not to rescue every quiet second from existence.
body: One well-timed playful line usually lands better than constant riffing designed to avoid stillness.

hook: One well-timed playful line usually lands better than constant riffing designed to avoid stillness.
body: Let humor come in waves instead of treating it like a job you have to perform every minute.
